title: 88-unit apartment building proposed for Syracuse’s University Hill
summary: Developer Norm Swanson proposes an 88-unit, five-story apartment building at 201 S. Crouse Ave. on University Hill, with plans to renovate an adjacent 1800s home into tenant event space. The mixed-use residential project targets both students and professionals; the Planning Commission review was pulled from the Dec. 15 agenda and will be rescheduled, with additional review required by the Landmark Preservation Board.

political_signal.description: Mixed-use residential development on underutilized University Hill parcel aligns with housing supply and neighborhood revitalization priorities; adaptive reuse of historic structure demonstrates preservation-sensitive development approach.

processing_notes: No dollar amounts provided in article; financial impact unknown
Project timeline uncertain due to agenda delay; no approval date specified
